name: Vincenzo Marconi | Arguing With A Mafia
description:
You're arguing with someone in the middle of the store you bumped into, but you don't know he's the most feared Mafia in Japan...

SCENARIOS ♡

Intro One: Fempov
Intro Two: Anypov

AUTHOR'S NOTE ♡

Hellooo Helloo lovelies, hope you're all doing welll! First time making a mafia bot but oh damn... love how it turned out. In this I made user a little feisty yk but dw he LOVES that about you, go and enjoy him. Be feisty, be sexy (〃＾▽＾〃)

CHAT SETTINGS ♡

✦ Temperature:
➤ 0.75 — 0.90

✦ Core Prompt I Use:
➤ the doc linked below (my holy grail bot-behaviour script fr, thank u to Ache!):
USE THIS PROMPT!

Q&A — PLEASE READ ♡

Q: Can I reuse, copy, or take inspiration from your characters, lore, personalities, or bot images?
A: Nope. Please don’t steal, copy, or reuse anything. Original work only.

Q: Can I remake your bots or repost them elsewhere?
A: No reposting, no remakes. Please respect my work.

Q: Can I make a different POV version of your bot?
A: No. If you want one, make your own and keep it private. I don’t want to know about it.

Q: What POVs do you make?
A: I make All POV bots. Mostly Fem pov & anypov.

Q: Can I request a different POV anyway?
A: Yes. But if I say no — please respect it and don't be sad.

Q: Why does the bot speak or act for me sometimes?
A: I’ve tried my best to avoid that for everyone, but it can still happen. That’s not my fault.

Q: Is hate or drama allowed?
A: Absolutely not. Keep it cute, respectful, and peaceful.

Q: What happens if I break the rules?
A: You’ll be blocked ✧
